meta.scope: actor=human; type play|pass; human always seat 0 in this export
meta.basePackage: p_w17_brfltrash (BR free-lead trash/pair only — zero combat axis)

method.freeCombatSplit: scaled from prior export playlog-strategy-inference.json free/combat rates on human decisions (504/714 of 1218) applied to 1389; consistency-checked vs free-lead null count 894
method.structureClasses: event-sampled combat plays/passes + prior CF div classes (playlog-strategy-inference / playlog-human-vs-live-divs) scaled; full sbc census script at evolve/_tmp_playlog_combat_diverge.py for re-run
method.reRun: python3 evolve/_tmp_playlog_combat_diverge.py  # writes exact sbc/pattern counts

counts.note_freeCombat: freeLead/combat split uses prior ratio (41.4/58.6); combatPass exact 213; combatPlay=combat-213; freeLead=humanPlayPass-combat

structurePreserving_looseSingle.method: majority of combat single answers with hand count==1 at played rank; sample g_mrk08snv first combat chose pair-break instead; prior residual hBetter 186 favors preserve

structurePreserving_minSbcBeat.method: min-sbc among cheap is expert default + human often matches; subset of combat plays

structureBreaking_pairBreak.method: sample: g_mrk08snv i=3 human 6♥ from pair-of-6 when loose 8♥ legal; scale from H_overkill / break samples

structureBreaking_minBeatHighSbc.method: min-rank beat that still pair-breaks when no looser lower single

passWithAnyLegal.method: sample 5 human passes: 2 forced (legalsCount=0), 1 with legal seq, 2 pending; prior H_pass_E_play=30 of combat divs; human pass 213 total → ~40-50% forced

passWithCheapLegal.method: subset of passWithLegal where legal is non-2 non-bomb; expertPolicy NEVER passes when cheap exists — pure residual

twoForControl.method: prior H_2_E_non2=53 scaled ×1.14; playlog gold Ace-climb / mid-top 2-tempo

passSave2s.method: human passes with rank-12 in hand + non-empty legals; samples @9095 (22 in hand vs pair6), @41823 (2 in hand vs long seq)

examples.note: prior CF: human residual multi / structure answers mid combat
counter-example also present: pair-break 6 when loose 8 legal — structure not universal

top5HumanPatternClasses.w17Coverage: UNCOVERED_combat_residual (expertPolicy never passes when cheap exists)
UNCOVERED_combat_residual (partially covered by live probe-TWO / V94_TWO_OMIN2 in expertPolicy, not by W17 BR FL)

w17Coverage.note: p_w17_brfltrash only rewrites free-lead BR candidates: (1) bropair low-pair force hand≥11 omin≥6; (2) trash-first when control+trash+hi multi hand 8..12. Combat path uses cheapLegals+orderLegals only.

leastCovered_combatResiduals.why: W17 never enters combat BR/expert cheap path
expertPolicy: if (cheap.length) return orderLegals(cheap)[0] — hard always-play
no combat pass-structure on W17; W16 pass burned DEV_VAL
live has probe-TWO/OMIN2; W17 package inherits base expert 2-tempo but BR FL trash does not address combat 2 choice
AI already prefers min-sbc; residual is opposite (when human breaks) — not a ship lever

leverProposal.name: ex_combat_residual_force_minsbc
leverProposal.axis: expertPolicy combat residual hard sort — NOT BR FL; SoftN forbidden; no duals in this note
leverProposal.estimatedFireMass: every combat cheap decision with ≥2 same-type answers — majority of ~601 combat plays
leverProposal.whyLeastCoveredByW17: W17 only mutates free-lead BR cand set. Holdout both-lose under brfltrash is ~81% freeze-identical; combat leaf change is the architectural residual.

ruleSketch.when: cur present && cheap nonempty && handLen≥7 && omin≥4 && curTop<10 && same-type pool≥2
ruleSketch.then: hard sort pool by sbc ASC → residual pairCount DESC → residual maxRun DESC → gap ASC; return first. ALWAYS PLAY (no pass — avoids W16 DEV_VAL landmine).

altNotChosen.name: ex_combat_struct_pass_breakonly
altNotChosen.whyNotPrimary: W16 pass-unique burned DEV_VAL reverse; STATUS next prefers residual scoring without pass gate first

censusScript.status: script ready; full sbc re-run recommended when shell available
